test: Piper Meeting Scheduling Capability via SimulatedWorld
scenario: Cross-timezone meeting (3 attendees, 3 timezones, conflicts present)

piper_result.proposed_time: Thursday 2026-07-10 at 1 PM ET (10 AM PT / 6 PM UK)

gaps.issue: Charlie scheduled at 6 PM UK time

gaps.problem: System did not check if time respects working hours
User is stuck with this time or manual rescheduling
System did not analyze or warn about TZ boundaries
Charlie gets invite at 6 PM with no explanation

Availability Detection.reason: Found available slot but missed working hours impact

Timezone Handling.reason: Booked time without timezone-aware working hours check

Conflict Detection.reason: No overlapping hard conflicts detected (1 false negative)

Working Hours Respect.reason: Charlie booked at 6 PM - completely violates his hours

Communication.reason: No strategy or heads-up about impact

recommendations.title: Implement working-hours-aware scheduling
recommendations.description: Check attendee working hours for proposed times

recommendations.title: Add timezone conflict detection
recommendations.description: Warn when meeting times impact working hours across TZs

recommendations.title: Provide alternative suggestions
recommendations.description: Generate 3-5 alternative times that minimize TZ impact
recommendations.impact: User has options instead of forcing one time

recommendations.title: Add communication strategy
recommendations.description: Explain impact to attendees, offer async option
